notes: Core mechanics partially work but the tractor beam capture state is buggy (capturedFighter movement in render vs update conflict, captorBoss state machine inconsistencies), enemies don't properly return to grid after diving, and several undefined variable references (captiveState) cause runtime errors that break gameplay flow.

The build has recognizable Galaga elements and mostly working left/right/fire controls, but core logic is incomplete and buggy—especially the capture/tractor sequence state handling, undefined captiveState usage, and several gameplay inaccuracies that hurt stability and playability.
